mapper.insert: INSERT INTO STUDY_ROOM_NOTICE(POST_NO, USER_NO, NOTICE_TITLE, NOTICE_CONTENT, NOTICE_DATE) VALUES(#{post_no}, #{user_no}, #{notice_title}, #{notice_content}, #{notice_date})
INSERT INTO STUDY_Moment(POST_NO, USER_NO, MOMENT_PICTURE, MOMENT_TITLE) VALUES(#{post_no}, #{user_no}, #{moment_picture}, #{moment_title})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM STUDY_ROOM_NOTICE WHERE POST_NO = #{post_no} ORDER BY notice_post_date DESC
SELECT * FROM STUDY_MOMENT WHERE POST_NO = #{post_no} ORDER BY moment_post_date DESC
